title: The Among Us Mod
description: A Mod About The Game Among Us In Minecraft
body: Among Us Among Us AMONG US!! We All Know The Game. Have You Ever Wanted It To Be In Minecraft? WELL NOW IT IS!! Explore the possibilities!! (not many.) FIND NEW STRUCTURES!!!! KILL THE IMPOSTTERS!!!! GET 2 NEW POTIONS!!! (GET THE BLACK AND WHITE SWORD!!(exclusively in the among us structures!!!)) well, thats about it! might not be much but, even the smaller-ish minecraft mod can be VERY entertaining﻿. Enjoy!
